tags.name: POV
tags.description: Point of View; features scenes shown from the perspective of the series protagonist.

tags.name: Anthropomorphism
tags.description: Contains non-human character(s) that have attributes or characteristics of a human being.

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Nanashi Kaidan 2nd Season
synopsis: Second season of Nanashi Kaidan. A mysterious man named Mukuroji tells a ghost story that no one knows and should not be known, that is Nanashi Kaidan. A girl named Bon and a boy named Koko join forces to seal away the supernatural.

title: Hwasan Golae
synopsis: In the year 2070, mankind faces a life threatening crisis due to huge earthquakes and volcanic eruptions. Korea is in a state of anarchy and Busan is swarming with refugees. Young street dealer Ha-jin has the ability to communicate with whales – a fact she keeps hidden from everyone. One day, a onearmed woman named Baek Sang-won asks Ha-jin to join her in the gules whale hunt. Painful memories lead Ha-jin to turn down the offer initially, but she eventually ends up joining Baek. As she makes friends on the ship, she grows curious about the gules whale and learns that every crew member has a sad gules story. The madness in the crews’ eyes as they try to kill the gules brings Ha-jin’s trauma to the forefront of her mind – and she experiences her own madness. (Source: Korean Film Biz Zone)

title: Moeru Butsuzou Ningen
synopsis: There is a series of Buddha statue thefts in Kyoto. Beniko, a high school girl, gets the Buddha statue at her family's temple stolen and has her parents killed at the same time. Beniko hears from Enju, her parents' friend, that a robbery group called SEADDATTHA is the one who killed her parents, and feels the strong urge for vengeance. Enju offers Beniko to live with him since she has no place to go. She wanders into Enju's secret room and meets an ugly creature that looks like a fusion of her parents and Buddha statue... (Source: IMDb)

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

tags.name: Gore
tags.description: Prominently features graphic bloodshed and violence.

tags.name: Orphan
tags.description: Prominently features a character that is an orphan.

tags.name: Afterlife
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the afterlife.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

title: Helpless void
synopsis: At night, a man holds out his own leash into the void. He has to explode in order to escape. Graduate Work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

title: Children of the Shadows
synopsis: A boy and his sister are nearly eaten by their father and they rush out of the house. They run away in their father’s car and wind up in the wilderness, where they meet a Giant and a Witch. This animation film in black & white charcoal drawings uses the sound of a bass guitar and combines a Japanese Manga feel with a fairy tale by the Brothers Grimm.

title: Hontoni Atta Gakkou Kaidan
titleNative: ほんとにあった学校怪談
synopsis: An omnibus OVA where three elementary school students, Manabu, Ryota, and Mina, deal with mysteries they encounter at their school. This OVA is split into two stories of 15 minutes each: "Poisonous spiders at school" and "Hanako-san's hand". This OVA is based on the "Hontoni Atta Kowai Hanashi" series derived from the "Hontoni Atta Gakou Kaidan" series published by Asahi Sonorama.

title: Nanja Monja Obake
titleNative: なんじゃもんじゃおばけ
synopsis: An anime made entirely in sumi-e following a child fox spirit and his morphing ability for haunting but he ends up getting scared himself.

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: He Zhong Zhi Hai
synopsis: Four participants playtest a virtual reality game that is still under development. The game uses AI simulated NPCs and system dynamics to generate a world with features not created by the developers, and perhaps beyond human understanding.

tags.name: Cosmic Horror
tags.description: A type of horror that emphasizes human insignificance in the grand scope of cosmic reality; fearing the unknown and being powerless to fight it.

tags.name: Virtual World
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the world inside a video game.

tags.name: Gods
tags.description: Prominently features a character of divine or religious nature.

tags.name: Software Development
tags.description: Centers around characters developing or programming a piece of technology, software, gaming, etc.

title: Burning Village
titleNative: バーニング・ビレッジ
synopsis: Animal folk tales set in the titular community, in which local eccentric Ohahai retells several popular fairy tales with considerable license. (Source: AniDB)

title: Nanashi Kaidan 3rd Season
synopsis: Third season of Nanashi Kaidan. A mysterious man named Mukuroji tells a ghost story that no one knows and should not be known, that is Nanashi Kaidan. A girl named Bon and a boy named Koko join forces to seal away the supernatural.

title: Keep Forgetting
synopsis: Why do you want acceptance? If it's not going to happen, then forget about what it was you wanted acknowledged and just have some soup, like always. Graduate Work 2019, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Shin Gakkou no Yuurei
synopsis: Following the popularity of the original omnibus OVA, this release offers 4 more stories but in animation only.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Ghost
tags.description: Prominently features a character who is a ghost.

title: Boku no Koi
synopsis: A multimedia animation (traditional paintings with digital effects) that Hiroshi Harada produced in the mid-90s.

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: CGI
tags.description: Prominently features scenes created with computer-generated imagery.

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

title: Zombie Clay Animation: LIFE OF THE DEAD
titleRomaji: Zombie Clay Animation: LIFE OF THE DEAD
titleNative: ゾンビクレイアニメ「LIFE OF THE DEAD」
synopsis: Clay animation about a guy stuck in a room during zombie apocalypse.

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

tags.name: Zombie
tags.description: Prominently features reanimated corpses which often prey on live humans and turn them into zombies.

title: Zashikiro
synonyms: 極彩色肉筆絵巻 座敷牢
synopsis: Born in Asuka Village, Sakichi was discriminated against by the villagers because of his appearance. One day, Sakichi discovered Reiko being held captive in a large mansion. Sakichi infiltrates the mansion to rescue her, only to find it to be a trick mansion filled with various traps and mazes. (Source: Kanazawa Film Fest 2025 Website, translated) Note: Production began in 1992 following the completion of MIDORI, with Harada working on the film single-handedly and funding it himself.

title: Anime-ban Toukaidou Yotsuya Kaidan
titleNative: アニメ版 東海道・四谷怪談
synopsis: An adaptation of Yotsuya Kaidan, a classic Japanese horror story about a ghost getting revenge.

title: Rootless heart
synopsis: Two boys are playing in ruins. There is something lurking in the dark...This is the stop motion animation on the theme of fear. Graduate Work 2011, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation Prize: 2012 Puchon International Fantastic Film Festival in 2012, Jury's Choice 2012 24th Tokyo Students Film Festival, Grand prize＆Audience Award 2012 Independent Animation Festival, Jury's Choice 2012 Yubari International Fantastic Film Festival in 2012, scholarship 2011 Shimokitazawa Film Festival, Grand prize 2011 West Tokyo Film Festival, Excellence Award (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: Ye Che
synopsis: Under a moonlit sky, a bus speeds along the coast when a panicky scream shatters the silence - a necklace is stolen. Then it is followed by a fatal accident as the plot unfolds with love, hatred and vengeance.

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

tags.name: Primarily Adult Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters above a high school age.

tags.name: Revenge
tags.description: Prominently features a character who aims to exact punishment in a resentful or vindictive manner.

tags.name: Gore
tags.description: Prominently features graphic bloodshed and violence.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Pregnancy
tags.description: Features pregnant female characters or discusses the topic of pregnancy.

tags.name: Wilderness
tags.description: Predominantly features a location with little to no human activity, such as a deserted island, a jungle, or a snowy mountain range.

title: Save Me
synopsis: A man found a strange bottle in an empty public restroom toilet.

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: In My Room
synopsis: This installation work is inspired by dreams experienced during a fever. The two-minute looping animation visualizes incoherent nightmares seen intermittently when having a hallucinatory fever. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: Demons
tags.description: Prominently features malevolent otherworldly creatures.

tags.name: Suicide
tags.description: The act or an instance of taking or attempting to take one's own life voluntarily and intentionally.

tags.name: Achromatic
tags.description: Contains animation that is primarily done in black and white.

title: Shen Hai Yu Jin
synopsis: On that day, the fog blocked everything. On that day, he became the captain of a ghost ship. On that day, he stepped through the thick fog and confronted a completely subverted and fragmented world— the old order had vanished, strange phenomena dominated the endless seas beyond civilized society, and isolated island city-states and fleets of ships challenged the sea that had become the last ember of lights for the civilized world. All of this while the shadows of the old days were still stirring in the deep sea, waiting to devour this world that was about to die. But for the new captain of the ghost ship Vanished, there was only one question he had to consider first — Who knows how to steer this ship?!

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Jigoku Koushien
synopsis: It's every high school baseball team's dream to go to the legendary Koshien Stadium Tournament. For the first time in years, Seido High School has a chance—star player Gorilla Matsui has finally given the team an opportunity to succeed. Most delighted at this prospect is Principal Kocho. However, the Head teacher reveals to him that the first game will be played against the Gedo High School, infamous for brutally killing all their opponents. Kocho instantly loses all hope, both for his students' lives and of winning the tournament.

tags.name: Delinquents
tags.description: Features characters with a notorious image and attitude, sometimes referred to as "yankees".

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

tags.name: Flash
tags.description: Created using Flash animation techniques.

tags.name: Baseball
tags.description: Centers around the sport of baseball.

tags.name: Parody
tags.description: Features deliberate exaggeration of popular tropes or a particular genre to comedic effect.
